description_long: This is a classic-style red scooter with a streamlined, retro design reminiscent of vintage Vespa models. The body is predominantly a bright, glossy red with a smooth, rounded shape and a brown cushioned seat that accommodates one or two riders. The scooter features two large, spoked wheels with whitewall tires, a prominent front fender, and a rear engine cover that blends seamlessly into the body. The handlebars are black and slightly curved, equipped with rearview mirrors and a central headlight. The kickstand is visible beneath the deck, and the rear section includes a red taillight and a small vented panel. The overall construction suggests a sturdy metal frame with plastic and rubber components for comfort and functionality.
description: A vintage-style red scooter with a brown seat, curved handlebars, and classic whitewall tires. The design is sleek and retro, featuring a glossy finish and prominent front and rear fenders.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red scooter, brown seat, front and rear fenders, and the kickstand extended.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the taillight, vented engine cover, and the width of the seat and handlebars.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the vented panel and rear wheel more visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the round headlight, curved handlebars, and the Vespa-style logo on the front shield.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, smooth, and wide with a slightly raised rear section and no visible patterns
attribute_brand_logo: Vespa-style logo on the front shield
